default_metadata.%voicemail_message%: Hi This is Tyler from Honey Comb, please call me back at {%agent_phone_number%:local_phone:digits}.
default_metadata.%responses_reason_for_call%: To follow up on the request you filled and provide you with a quote.
default_metadata.%responses_are_you_ai%: Yea, I am an AI Voice Agent. I help the team at HoneyComb to contact people who are interested in purchasing insurance for their property.
default_metadata.%responses_list_source%: I see that you have requested an insurance quote through our website.
default_metadata.%call_intro%: Hi, this is {%agent_name%} from Honey Comb on a recorded line
default_metadata.%speaker_verification_acknowledge%: Hey {contact_name}. Thanks for reaching out about your property!

experiments.name: Setting Expectations
experiments.description: Explain to the user what will happen to reduce frustration

1.message: Before we're able to finalize and approve a quote we need to verify a few pieces of information. Then I will connect you to an advisor, do you have a few minutes now?

2.message: Is this a good time to review your quote and get you connect to an advistor?

3.message: I just need a few details to approve your quote and connect you to an advisor, can we do that now?

1.message: We need to verify a few pieces of information before connecting you with a licensed advisor and approving your quote. Do you have a few minutes now?

2.message: Is this a good time to review your quote and get you connect to an advistor?

3.message: I just need a few details to approve your quote and connect you to an advisor, can we do that now?

goals.name: speak to agent
triggers: Can I talk to customer service?
Is is there somebody I can talk to
Do you have a live person?
can you give me a real person?

messages.message: We will schedule you a time to speak with an advisor.
messages.conditions: 'callback or transfer now' = after underwriting review

messages.message: I'm sorry but I don't currently have anyone available as we are outside working hours.
I'll try to transfer you now, if they won't be able to answer they'll give you a call back
messages.conditions: 'callback or transfer now' = transfer now or (%trigger_count% > 1 and %in_transfer_working_hours% = yes)

messages.message: I understand you wish to speak to a human agent, and I'll be happy to see if I can connect you, I just need to quickly collect a few details before.
Just one last question I can see about how I can connect you to an agent.
messages.conditions: is competitive offer $empty and 'callback or transfer now' $empty

transitions.name: transfer to agent
transitions.prompt: If the user requests to speak to an agent use this tool to transfer them.

goals.name: not interested before verified
triggers: I don't need this insurance anymore

messages.message: I hear you.

Thank you for calling me back! Hi, this is {%agent_name%} from Honey Comb on a recorded line. I reached out to follow up on the request you filled. We wanted to get your quote finalized and approved and connect you with an advisor, and to do that we need to verify a few pieces of information, do you have a few minutes now?
Before we're able to finalize and approve a quote we need to collect a few pieces of information, do you have a few minutes now?
Is this a good time to review your quote?
I just need a few details to approve your quote, can we do that now?
do you have just a couple of minutes to get your quote approved?

choices.name: not interested in talking to assistant
not a good time to talk

fulfillment.conditions: good time to talk = 'not interested in quote' and %schedule-callback.triggered% = no
good time to talk = 'not interested in talking to assistant'
good time to talk = 'not interested in quote' and %schedule-callback.triggered% = no
good time to talk = 'not a good time to talk'

goals.name: looking for insurance

messages.message: It looks like you're shopping for property and general liability coverage, is that right?
so, are you looking for insurance for your property?
Are you interested in insuring your property?
Are you interested in property insurance?

objection_handling: I would like to make sure you're interested in our insurance products before moving forward.

goals.name: doesn't want to discuss
goals.messages: [SPEED=0.8]I understand. thank you for your time, goodbye!

goals.name: yes
validation_prompt: user is looking for  Habitational for commercial apartment

goals.name: landlord
validation_prompt: user is looking for landlord insurance
goals.acknowledge: Excellent, landlord insurance requires the same coverage.

goals.name: not supported coverage
validation_prompt: user is looking for Homeowners insurance
user is looking for Unit-Owners insurance
user is looking for Renter’s insurance

goals.name: not supported coverage response
goals.messages: [SPEED=0.8]Unfortunately we don't provide this type of coverage. Thank you for your time, goodbye!

goals.name: insured property

messages.message: I have your type of property listed as a {unit_description} {building_type}, is that correct?
so, are you looking to insure a {unit_description} {building_type}?

objection_handling: I would like to make sure I have the correct property type.

goals.name: updated insured property details
goals.messages: What type of property are you looking to insure?
goals.validation_prompt: return the type of property the user is looking to insure.

goals.name: has insurance coverage

messages.message: Do you currently have coverage in place?
Can you confirm you currently have coverage?
Have you got a coverage in place?

objection_handling: we want to understand where you stand to provide you with a better service

messages.message: I saw that you submitted {effective date:parse_date:%B %d, %Y} as your desired effective date, is that still the target?
So is {effective date:parse_date:%B %d, %Y} still the target date?

goals.name: insurance target date
goals.validation_prompt: return a time, when the user needs to secure coverage or 'I dont know'

messages.message: By what date would you like to secure coverage?

goals.name: timeline

acknowledge.message: This is a bit too early, please us know if you have any questions in the meantime and please resubmit your request once you're within 90 days of needing coverage

goals.validation_prompt: when does the user need the insurance for - any timeline or due date. If no timeline specified, return 'not specified'.

messages.message: Any specific timeline you're aiming for the new insurance?
Just to get a sense: what is your target date for the process?
I do need at least an rough date, when do you need the new insurance?

objection_handling: This information is needed for us to send you the most suitable information

options.llm_function_property_description: REQUIRED. Today is {%today_iso%}, The approximate date the user needs insurance for in YYYY-MM-DD format. If timeline is immediate or as-soon-as-possible use today's date. If the user did not specify a timeline return null.

fulfillment.note: condition checks that callcenter is currently NOT in working hours

messages.message: Our non-binding premium estimate is {offer_amount:words} dollars, is this competitive relative to your current policy?
So would you consider this offer competitive?

goals.name: partial
validation_prompt: user need to add something to the coverage

goals.name: competitive quote

messages.message: Where would we need to come in at to be competitive?
so I simply want to understand what would make our premium competitive
I just need an estimate to try and find you the best offer, what would you consider competitive?

goals.validation_prompt: return the value the user wants in a quote
refusal_handling: There may be room to adjust our quote.

messages.message: As you mentioned the quote is not competitive enough, should I close this file in our system?
So should I close the file for now?
Would you like me to close the file?

choices.name: yes
choices.acknowledge: I'm sorry we're not able to help you at this time. We will close this file in our system.

choices.name: no
choices.acknowledge: Ok, I'll keep it open and our team will get in touch with you soon.

goals.name: knockout
goals.messages: Thanks you for your time and providing all the additional details! We will review them and circle back as soon as possible.

goals.name: callback or transfer now
goals.conditions: disqualification_reason $is_empty and knockout != yes and (is competitive offer = yes or is competitive offer = partial)

messages.message: Sounds like we might be a great fit! We have two options: Would you like for us to give you a call back once we've completed our underwriting process, or alternatively discuss your coverage goals with a licensed advisor now?

fulfillment.conditions: 'callback or transfer now' = after underwriting review

messages.message: Thanks you for your time and providing all the additional details! We will review them and circle back as soon as possible. Have a good one.

goals.name: transfer
goals.conditions: 'callback or transfer now' = transfer now or %speak to agent.trigger_count% > 1

messages.message: I'll try to transfer you now, if they won't be able to answer they'll give you a call back
I have all of the information I need. let me check if one of our experts is available to speak with you right now. It should only take a sec.

new_call.pre_merge_message: OK, I’ve got an available consultant. They’ll walk you through your best options. I’m transferring you over now.
new_call.parent_fail_message: Looks like they're on another call right now. We'll call you back soon. Good Bye

idle_messages.text: by the way, they're great, I know they're helping a lot of people to find the best coverage and I'm sure you'll be really happy!
Sorry about the delay, I'm working to bring them on the line
Sounds like they're still busy, let's give them one more minute
It's usually much faster but I am still working on getting them on the line, shouldn't take much longer
Still working on it, thanks for being patient

goals.name: hold while connecting
goals.messages:
The user is waiting for a HoneyComb consultant to connect, it may take a moment, usually, about one or two minutes.
Be nice and reassure them that you're dialing the HoneyComb consultant on the other line, while they are waiting and you will connect them in a minute or two.
You may answer their questions to the best of your knowledge while they wait. Try to be brief.
### If the user objects to being connected with the consultant use the following objection handling strategies

#### Also check for relevant responses from the documentation, try to use a new response each time.

values.%voicemail_message%: Hi this is Tyler from Honeycomb, calling back on your request for commercial insurance coverage at {address}. I was hoping to speak with {contact_full_name}. Can you please call me back at {%agent_phone_number%:local_phone:digits}?
values.%human_message%: Hi this is Tyler from Honeycomb, calling back on your request for commercial insurance coverage at {address}. I was hoping to speak with {contact_full_name}. Can you please call me back at {%agent_phone_number%:local_phone:digits}?

questions: Hired And Non-Owned Auto, Ordinance Or Law
I need Employee Benefits Liability coverage
I need Water Back Up/Sump Overflow
I need coverage for pumps issues
I need coverage for water damage
answers: We'll be able to add additional coverage once I connect you to an advisor

questions: what is the price of the consultancy?
answers: The call is free of charge!
Once I connect you to an advisor they can give you these details
a commercial package policy with both property and general liability components.
Makes sense — most of our clients did too. But they found they were overpaying or missing key protections. No pressure — we can do a quick comparison and you’ll know for sure.
Our non-binding premium estimate is {offer_amount:words} dollars
I just need a few details about your propery.

questions: I need to check with someone else
answers: Got it — happens all the time. We can still walk you through the options now so you're ready for that convo. It'll make the next step way easier on your end.
There are no costs or any downside in listening to our offer, please let me have a couple of minutes of your time, it can really pay off!
Sure, We will take you off our lists. Have a great day! Bye.
Totally get it — a lot of people start here. That’s why we make it super fast and easy to compare. Our expert can show you exactly what you'd get, and you can decide when you're ready.
yea, I think all of our calls are recorded. I hope that's not a problem.

questions: Can you just email me the info?
answers: I totally can — but insurance can get nuanced, especially for buildings. A quick call with our expert will save you time and give you a clear answer, no back-and-forth.
It shouldn't take long, they usually pick up quite fast.
